sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104740" key="triakonta/draxmoi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῐᾱκοντά-δραχμοι</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πυροί,</foreign> wheat <sense id="n104740.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">at thirty</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δραχμαί,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:4:165" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.165</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
